tracks.rawText: 3:19Raquel HFv5.5Salsa colombiana mid-tempo with punchy congas, timbales, bongos, campana accents, and guacharaca driving a lifted clave groove, Bright piano montunos, fat bass tumbao, and brass hits answered by flute lines, Warm room reverb, tape saturation, and stacked chorus vocals create a suspended, timeless atmosphere3PublishRemix
